creator: wenheping2000@hotmail.com
text:
Hi,

   Here is a new patch to update to 0.8.10.

wen


--- Makefile	(revision 489555)
+++ Makefile	(working copy)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	python-docx
-PORTVERSION=	0.8.6
+PORTVERSION=	0.8.10
 CATEGORIES=	textproc python
 MASTER_SITES=	CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
Index: distinfo
===================================================================
--- distinfo	(revision 489555)
+++ distinfo	(working copy)
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-TIMESTAMP = 1491822755
-SHA256 (python-docx-0.8.6.tar.gz) = 55ece6fd4a4fa3389909fa0e51400fce428e1fb6f6ef3599cbba31673441f184
-SIZE (python-docx-0.8.6.tar.gz) = 5270212
+TIMESTAMP = 1547105783
+SHA256 (python-docx-0.8.10.tar.gz) = bc76ecac6b2d00ce6442a69d03a6f35c71cd72293cd8405a7472dfe317920024
+SIZE (python-docx-0.8.10.tar.gz) = 5531674
